ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the passenger (0 = Female, 1 = Male) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard the Titanic */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard the Titanic */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Port of Embarkation (0 = Cherbourg, 1 = Queenstown, 2 = Southampton) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Intended destination of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the passenger */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the passenger's occupation */,
  "travel_companions" TEXT /* List of passenger IDs of travel companions */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Any known health conditions of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat_number" INTEGER /* The number of the lifeboat the passenger was assigned to, if applicable */,
  "lifeboat_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_occupied" INTEGER /* The number of people in the lifeboat */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* The name of the ship that rescued the passenger, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the port city */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Brief description of the port's historical significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first passenger in the relationship */,
  "passenger_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second passenger in the relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., spouse, sibling, parent, child) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Categorical type of relationship (e.g., immediate family, extended family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_passenger_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_1") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_passenger_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_2") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "issue_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was issued */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., valid, void) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the cabin */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the cabin */,
  "cabin_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of people in the cabin */,
  "cabin_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voyage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voyage route */,
  "number_of_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "number_of_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "total_fare_collected" REAL /* Total fare collected for the voyage */,
  "disaster_details" TEXT /* Description of any disasters or significant events during the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyage" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger disembarked from the ship */,
  "voyage_status" TEXT /* Status of the passenger's voyage (e.g., completed, interrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyage_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyage_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
